updates.description: Aggregate customer segment representing tens of thousands of business domains using Rackspace Email hosted email service. Identified via OSINT through reverse MX record analysis showing domains resolving to mx1.emailsrvr.com and mx2.emailsrvr.com. Primarily SMB and mid-market organizations. Served from Rackspace-owned data centers on AS33070 (DFW) and AS27357 (IAD) infrastructure. com MX record analysis, ipinfo.io ASN domain enumeration, Rackspace Email product page.
